title: Genetic Legacy
definition: The inheritance and transmission of genetic information across generations.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Like passing down a family heirloom, traits are passed from parents to their offspring through DNA.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: Genetic legacy describes the transfer of genetic information, encoded in DNA, from one generation to the next, shaping characteristics and vulnerabilities across species.
difficulty_levels.expert: Investigating genetic legacies offers insights into inherited diseases, evolutionary history, and the mechanisms of inheritance itself. This knowledge can lead to improved medical care and informed breeding practices.

extra_fields.insight: The transmission of genetic information between generations shapes the diversity and adaptability of life forms across time.
